title: Most people get these 3 AI terms wrong
summary: Jeff Su clarifies three frequently misunderstood AI terms. Hallucination is reframed as the same mechanism behind both creative and erroneous outputs, context window as a fixed-size memory buffer that drops old information, and tokens as the chunked units that determine usage costs on AI services.
